annotations.label: SU(3)×SU(2)×U(1) gauge symmetry

anchor.section: Construction of the Standard Model Lagrangian
anchor.snippet: gauge symmetry is an internal symmetry that essentially defines the Standard Model

annotations.note: Mathlib defines the abstract groups SU(n)/U(n) via Matrix.specialUnitaryGroup and Matrix.unitaryGroup, but not the Standard Model gauge group or its action as a physical symmetry.
